news.headline: US to urge Ukraine for ceasefires at Saudi meeting; focuses on peace commitments.
Crypto ETPs face $876M outflows for 4th week in row, with total $4.75B over 4 weeks. YTD inflows dip to $2.6B - CoinShares.
news.summary: CoinShares reports that in the last four weeks, a total of $4.75 billion has been withdrawn, leading to a decrease in year-to-date inflows to $2.6 billion.

news.headline: Astrum Mobile partners with SWISSto12 for NEASTAR-1 satellite, a 5G NTN platform in Asia Pacific; GEO SmallSat HummingSat to be manufactured.
news.summary: In the Asia Pacific region, Astrum Mobile has chosen SWISSto12's GEO SmallSat HummingSat for NEASTAR-1. This marks the launch of the first Satellite-to-Device (S2D) platform for 5G NTN services in the region.

news.headline: Hikvision unveils next-gen ProAV ecosystem at ISLE 2025 in China, showcasing digital innovations.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China, on March 10, 2025, Hikvision, known for innovation, presented cutting-edge ProAV technology at ISLE 2025, enhancing immersive experiences. This showcase underscores Hikvision's commitment to transforming professional audio-visual solutions. They aim to revolutionize the industry by pushing boundaries and setting new standards.

news.headline: Key Japanese government panel members call for vigilance to the risks of rising inflation hurting the economy
Synaptics introduces ultra-low-power SoC family for IoT with target market at ~$3.2 billion.
news.summary: The SYN461x has been designed for efficiency in power consumption, system integration, size, and speed to market, showcasing excellent rate-over-range capabilities and effortless interoperability. This technology is strategically positioned to tap into a market opportunity valued at approximately $3.2 billion.

news.headline: Global 4-Aminobenzoic Acid Market expected to reach USD 376.2 million by 2035, growing at 4.1% CAGR; demand fueled by pharmaceutical and cosmetic industries.
news.summary: The global 4-Aminobenzoic Acid Market is expected to reach USD 251.7 million in 2025 and grow at a CAGR of 4.1% to reach USD 376.2 million by 2035. The increased demand for pharmaceutical and cosmetic products is driving the market for 4-Aminobenzoic Acid, with PABA being utilized in synthesizing drugs like local anesthetics and folic acid. In the cosmetics industry, PABA is used in sunscreens for UV light absorption. Regions like Asia-Pacific, North America, and Europe are expected to see robust growth in demand for PABA from both sectors. Lifestyle changes and a growing focus on health and personal care are also contributing to market growth.

news.headline: Synaptics launches high-performance Adaptive MCUs for IoT, featuring three power levels to accelerate development.
news.summary: The SR-Series MCUs offer three different power levels and are designed to support Astra AI-Native hardware and open-source software. This design aims to speed up the creation of low-power, cognitive IoT devices.

news.headline: Genesis Energy, L.P. received $1.010 billion from Alkali Business sale, paid off $25 million in debt, and incurred 8.0% increment.
news.summary: Houston-based Genesis Energy LP (NYSE: GEL) provided an update on their recent receipt of approximately $1.010 billion in cash on February 28, 2025, from selling their Alkali Business. The company has used this cash to fully pay off its senior secured revolving credit facility, eliminating approximately $25 million in annual cash interest expenses. Additionally, Genesis has also made progress on addressing the remaining 8.0% of their outstanding debt. It highlights their strategic financial management and plans for future investments.

news.headline: Viamedia promotes Justin Johnston to SVP of Finance, leading financial strategy as the company expands beyond 100 video providers.
news.summary: Viamedia, a company based in Lexington, Kentucky, has recently appointed Justin Johnston as Senior Vice President of Finance. In his new role, Johnston will oversee the financial strategy of the company as it continues to grow and expand its services. This promotion comes as Viamedia surpasses 100 video service providers in its network.

news.headline: Fennec Pharma's 2024: PEDMARK® sales hit $29.6M for year, up 40%; Q4 saw $7.9M sales. Business update included.
news.summary: In the past year, PEDMARK® recorded impressive net product sales of $29.6 million, showcasing a significant 40% increase from the previous year. In the fourth quarter of 2024 alone, PEDMARK® generated net product sales of $7.9 million. These figures demonstrate strong growth and demand for PEDMARK® in the market.

news.headline: Perion increases share repurchase program to $125M from $75M, having already bought 5.2M shares for $46.8M.
news.summary: Perion Network Ltd., a prominent player in modern advertising technology, revealed an increase in its share repurchase program from $75 million to $125 million. The company's Board of Directors approved this $50 million expansion, with a total of 5.2 million shares already repurchased by December 31, 2024, amounting to $46.8 million. The company operates on both the NASDAQ and TASE markets under the ticker symbol PERI.

news.headline: QXO and Beacon Roofing discussing $11 billion acquisition, with QXO offering $124.35 per share in cash. Beacon postpones Investor Day.
news.summary: In Greenwich, Conn. and Herndon, Va., QXO, Inc. (NYSE: QXO) and Beacon Roofing Supply, Inc. (Nasdaq: BECN) have announced talks regarding a possible acquisition. The proposed deal would see QXO purchasing Beacon for $124.35 per share in cash, totaling around $11 billion. QXO is conducting standard due diligence on Beacon's operations, while both parties are working towards finalizing a formal agreement. As a result of these discussions, Beacon has decided to postpone its Investor Day event.

news.headline: Germany's AFD files urgent appeal with the constitutional court against the session of the outgoing parliament on Thursday - Court Spokesperson
The GEO Group modifies contract for 1,328-bed Karnes ICE Processing Center in Texas to house mixed populations.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, The GEO Group, Inc. revealed that U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has modified the contract for the 1,328-bed Karnes ICE Processing Center in Karnes City, Texas. Previously, the facility only housed adult males but will now accommodate mixed populations. GEO handles support services for ICE at the Center under an intergovernmental service agreement. GEO is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol GEO.

news.headline: Pioneer Insurance partners with Sapiens for digital innovation in the Philippines. Sapiens to provide P&C platform to support growth strategy.
news.summary: Sapiens Insurance Platform for Property and Casualty (P&C) is aiding Pioneer in advancing their extensive digital agenda and facilitating swift and economical scalability. Located in Uxbridge, England, this development was announced on March 10, 2025. Sapiens International Corporation, listed on NASDAQ as SPNS and on TASE as SPNS, is behind this initiative as a top-tier software solutions provider on a worldwide scale.

news.headline: Netcraft has introduced a real-time threat API for faster collaboration with infrastructure providers like cybercrime takedown.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Salt Lake City and London, Netcraft, a prominent cybercrime detection and removal company, launched a cutting-edge JSON-based API connected to its Cybercrime Disruption and Takedown platform. This innovative API raises the bar for immediate threat reporting by providing real-time updates, allowing for swift action against cyber threats. This development marks a significant milestone in enhancing cybersecurity measures on a global scale through advanced technology integration.

news.headline: Unconventional loans: potential solution for affordable housing, upending traditional mortgages.
Krispy Kreme introduces 4 St. Patrick’s Day doughnuts and offers chance to win free doughnuts for a year.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Krispy Kreme is promoting "Share the Taste O’Luck" with the launch of four new St. Patrick’s Day doughnuts. To add to the festivities, thousands have the chance to win free doughnuts for a year. The limited-time St. Patrick’s Day Collection, available at select Krispy Kreme stores starting today, includes four fresh flavors to delight customers: the Pot of Gold Doughnut – an Original Glaze and.

news.headline: Claussen launches limited-edition "Just The Brine" product after receiving thousands of requests, ahead of St. Patrick’s Day.
news.summary: In October, a social media video featuring a mix of diet cola and pickle juice went viral, amassing over 12 million views and generating numerous comments. In response, Claussen engaged with the conversation, hinting at a product named “Just The Brine” and committing to create it if there was sufficient interest. Following a surge of requests, less than six months later, Claussen has fulfilled its pledge. Timed perfectly for St. Patrick's Day festivities, Claussen has unveiled the new product called Jus.

news.headline: Experian forgives $5M in consumer debt for 5,000 families in Louisiana.
news.summary: Experian® has revealed a move to alleviate $5 million in consumer debt for 5,000 households in Louisiana's Costa Mesa area.

news.headline: Beam Therapeutics is offering 16,151,686 common stock at $28.48/share, expecting to raise $500.0 million.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Beam Therapeutics Inc. announced the pricing of a public offering, which includes 16,151,686 shares of common stock at $28.48 per share and pre-funded warrants for 1,404,988 shares at $28.47 per warrant. The pre-funded warrants have an exercise price of $0.01 per share and can be exercised immediately until fully utilized. The total gross proceeds from the offering are anticipated to be around $500.0 million. All securities in the offering will be offered by Beam Therapeutics. The closing of the offering is projected to take place around March 11, 2025, pending standard closing conditions.

news.headline: Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. appoints Gilbert Dychiao as Co-Head of Investment Banking in New York.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. revealed a notable change in its Investment Banking management team, a subsidiary of Oppenheimer Holdings listed on the NYSE as OPY. Gilbert Dychiao has been appointed to a key position. Oppenheimer, a prominent investment bank and wealth manager, made this strategic decision to enhance its operations.

news.headline: Nexus Industrial REIT shows 10.0% Q4 NOI growth, driven by acquisitions and development. SPNOI up 5.1%.
news.summary: Net Operating Income in the fourth quarter increased by 10.0%, primarily driven by gains from strategic acquisitions and development initiatives. Additionally, the industrial property sector saw a 5.1% growth in Same Property Net Operating Income (SPNOI) during the same period. These improvements signify a strong performance in the company's operations, with significant growth in key areas.

news.headline: Johnnie Walker introduces Johnnie Walker Vault for luxury Scotch whisky, offering bespoke blends, collaborations, and experiences.
news.summary: Johnnie Walker has launched the Johnnie Walker Vault, a new international luxury platform focused on the art of blending, bringing together unique blends, partnerships with cultural influencers, and exclusive experiences. The unveiling took place in EDINBURGH, Scotland, on March 10, 2025. This initiative is designed as a visionary hub for premium spirits, offering a curated selection of bespoke blends and luxurious events.

news.headline: Beam Therapeutics reports positive data for BEAM-302 in Phase 1/2 trial for AATD. Single dose led to durable increases in Total, Functional AAT & decreased Mutant Z-AAT.
news.summary: A recent study found that a single dose of BEAM-302 resulted in long-lasting and dose-dependent boosts in both total and functional Alpha-1 Antitrypsin (AAT). It also led to the production of Corrected M-AAT while reducing Mutant Z-AAT levels in the blood. These effects were observed across the first three dose levels tested in the study.

news.headline: ASQ Awards winners for best airports announced by ACI World and Amadeus based on customer experience.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Airports Council International (ACI) World, in collaboration with Amadeus, declared the recipients of the ASQ Awards. These awards are bestowed upon airports based on the most thorough and reliable worldwide assessment program for airport experience. The prestigious recognition highlights excellence in airport service quality, with winners selected through a rigorous evaluation process. This year, the distinguished awards honor airports that have demonstrated outstanding commitment to enhancing passenger satisfaction and overall travel experience.

news.headline: BEN partners with Vybroo and Grupo Siete to expand AI offerings in Latin America and Europe, reaching markets in Spain, Portugal, Italy, and Mexico.
news.summary: Wilmington, Delaware, March 10, 2025 - Brand Engagement Network Inc. (BEN) (NASDAQ: BNAI), a global provider of conversational AI agents, has broadened its reseller collaboration with Vybroo, a leading AI voice technology company that is part of Teleradionetworks S.A. de C.V. and Grupo Vibra Medios, a major radio broadcasting network in Mexico. Initially disclosed in July 2024, the enhanced partnership will deliver AI-driven solutions across Latin America, Spain, Portugal, and Italy, reinforcing BEN’s position in AI-powered digital media through Vybroo’s vast advertising network and Grupo Siete’s media platforms. This move aims to tap into new revenue streams in rapidly growing markets.

news.headline: Franco-Nevada reports strong Q4 results with GEO sales near top of guidance range in 2024. CEO Paul Brink comments.
news.summary: Impressive Performance in Fourth Quarter (all amounts in USD unless specified otherwise)In a statement made on March 10, 2025 in Toronto, CEO Paul Brink announced the strong fourth-quarter performance of their portfolio. This led to GEO sales for the year reaching towards the upper limit of the revised GEO guidance range.

news.headline: G2 Goldfields increases gold resources at the Oko Project in Guyana, totaling 2.5 km in high-grade zones, with significant growth in latest estimate.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, G2 Goldfields Inc. (TSX: GTWO; OTCQX: GUYGF) shared an updated Mineral Resource Estimate for its Oko Project in Guyana, spanning 83,967 acres. The main gold mineralization stretches across a 2.5 km north-south structure that encompasses the high-grade Oko Main Zone (OMZ) in the north and the bulk mineable Ghanie Gold Zone (Ghanie) in the south. This new Resource incorporates all drilling data collected until January 2025, showcasing a substantial increase from the prior estimate unveiled on April 3, 2024.

news.headline: Whitecap Resources and Veren to merge in $15B deal to become top Canadian light oil & condensate producer.
news.summary: In Calgary, AB on March 10, 2025, Whitecap Resources Inc. (WCP) and Veren Inc. (VRN) disclosed a strategic merger forming a top light oil and condensate producer. The companies, listed on TSX as WCP and VRN and NYSE as VRN, will consolidate their assets primarily in the Alberta Montney.

news.headline: KBR awarded $85M contract to supply airfield repair kits to US Air Force for AM-2 task.
news.summary: KBR has been awarded the AM-2 task to provide a range of airfield matting kits to the U.S. Air Force. This includes tasks involving fabrication, design, assembly, supply, packaging, and delivery.

news.headline: Analog Devices enhances CodeFusion Studio™ for faster product development & data security, includes System Planner and Data Provenance Software.
news.summary: The CodeFusion Studio System Planner offers a user-friendly approach to resource allocation in diverse architectures, enhancing code generation efficiency. The Data Provenance Software Development solution enhances data trust and traceability throughout the stack for customers. The software is based in Wilmington.

news.headline: High Tide plans to open two new Canna Cabana stores in Ontario; expanding presence in cannabis market.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Calgary, AB, High Tide Inc. (Nasdaq: HITI, TSXV: HITI, FSE: 2LYA), known for its retail-focused cannabis business, revealed its latest news. The company introduced its Canna Cabana retail division, emphasizing its commitment to offering significant value in the cannabis industry.

news.headline: Rick Kuhlman has been elected to FINRA's NAC Council after securing majority vote from nearly 150 member firms.
news.summary: Cambridge Investment Research, Inc. ("Cambridge"), a financial solutions firm catering to 3,800 financial professionals across the United States, saw Kuhlman, its Senior Vice President and Chief Legal Officer, successfully attain a majority vote from almost 150 FINRA member firms. This event took place in FAIRFIELD, Iowa on March 10, 2025.

news.headline: Bitcoin short trader made $7.5 million profit by shorting at $96,500, closing at $78,900. Now shorting at $94,424 with targets $70,475-$74,192.
news.summary: A major Bitcoin investor managed to earn a substantial profit of around $7.5 million by successfully betting against the popular cryptocurrency during the recent market downturn. The investor initially shorted Bitcoin at a price of roughly $96,500 on Feb. 22 and closed the position when the price dropped to approximately $78,900 six days later. After re-entering a short position at a peak of about $94,424 during a rally triggered by President Donald Trump's executive order regarding a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, the investor has strategically set additional short positions within the range of $92,449-$92,636. To capitalize on these positions, the investor has placed limit orders to secure profits between $70,475-$74,192.

news.headline: HI-LEX opts for Plex ERP system to improve efficiency, reduce costs. Expectations include lower scrappage rates & increased uptime.
news.summary: HI-LEX plans to improve efficiency by implementing a single advanced ERP system, anticipating a decrease in scrappage rates, enhanced uptime, and reduced IT support expenses. The decision was made to streamline operations and enhance overall performance. The move is expected to significantly impact the company's bottom line and boost productivity. The implementation of this system is part of the company's strategy to optimize its processes and drive growth.

news.headline: Pudu Robotics' PUDU T300 gets CE-MD and CE-RED certificates, meeting international safety standards for global manufacturing.
news.summary: Pudu Robotics, a prominent player in the service robotics industry based in Shenzhen, China, revealed on March 10, 2025, that their cutting-edge industrial delivery robot, the PUDU T300, successfully secured certifications vital for entering the European market. These certifications include the CE-MD (Machinery Directive) and CE-RED (Radio Equipment Directive) issued by TÜV. This development marks a significant milestone for Pudu Robotics, allowing the PUDU T300 to meet the necessary regulatory standards for distribution and operation in Europe.

news.headline: ChipMOS Technologies Inc. reports February 2025 revenue; an industry provider of OSAT; ticker: 8150; Nasdaq: IMOS.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, ChipMOS TECHNOLOGIES INC. ("ChipMOS" or the "Company"), listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange as 8150 and Nasdaq as IMOS, disclosed its unaudited consolidated financial report as a leading supplier of outsourced semiconductor assembly and test services.

news.headline: Positive results in Phase 2a RIVER trial for Haduvio in chronic cough patients, 57% reduction in cough frequency.
news.summary: The medication Haduvio successfully achieved the primary goal by significantly reducing 24-hour cough frequency, with a 57% change from baseline compared to a placebo (p<0.0001). This effect was consistent in patients with moderate to severe cough counts (p<0.0001). Haduvio stands as the initial and sole treatment option to demonstrate these results in the specified population.

news.headline: Jyske Realkredit A/S will list new Covered Bonds on Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S on 11th March 2025 with final terms provided.
news.summary: On March 10th, 2025, a press release (Announcement no. 22/2025) was issued to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S regarding the final terms of bonds that are set to be listed the following day on March 11th, 2025. Jyske Realkredit A/S will be launching new Covered Bonds (SDO) on this date, and the complete details of the bonds can be found in the attachment to the announcement.

news.headline: EFC publishes report on career-connected learning benefits for student success in finding good jobs.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, the Education Finance Council (EFC) released a research brief titled "Career-Connected Learning Can Enhance Student Success." EFC is a prominent national organization advocating for nonprofit and state-based higher education finance groups. The report emphasizes the benefits of career-oriented education in boosting student achievement. This publication serves as a valuable resource for institutions looking to enhance student outcomes.

news.headline: Southwest Airlines invited to speak at J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference. Webcast will be available.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) received an invitation to speak at the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference. The event will be webcasted live by J.P. Morgan, with a link accessible through the Investor Relations homepage.

news.headline: Orion plans to launch Biologics R&D Centre in UK by 2025, may shift some operations from Turku. #expansion #biotech
Nordic hydrogen startup collapses after failing to meet green energy goals. #RenewableEnergy #Failure
ServiceNow Q4 earnings: Revenue misses at $2.957B, EPS in line at $3.67. Total revenue up 21% y-o-y due to massive AI opportunity.
news.summary: ServiceNow Inc (NYSE:NOW) released its fourth-quarter financial results, revealing revenue of $2.957 billion, which fell short of the estimated $2.961 billion. The company reported adjusted earnings of $3.67 per share, aligning with analyst predictions. Despite missing revenue estimates, total revenue saw a 21% increase year-over-year, with subscription revenues also rising by 21% in the same period. ServiceNow disclosed remaining performance obligations of $10.7 billion by the end of the quarter.

news.headline: Data on early redemptions to Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S was shared on 10 March 2025 (Announcement no. 21/2025).
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S released Announcement no. 21/2025.

news.headline: Eurozone Sentix Investor Confidence Index Actual -2.9 (Forecast -9.3, Previous -12.7)
Acer's Feb revenues hit record high at NT$17.07B, 13.3% up from previous month and 5.9% YoY, NT$32.15B for year-to-Feb.
news.summary: In Taiwan's capital, on March 10, 2025, Acer Inc. disclosed its latest financial figures. The technology company reported consolidated revenues of NT$17.07 billion for February, reflecting a 13.3% increase compared to the previous month and a 5.9% increase year-on-year. The total consolidated revenues for the year up to February stood at NT$32.15 billion, marking a 2.6% YoY growth...

news.headline: Orkuveitan's annual financial statements show robust growth and solid performance. All attachments replaced due to pagination faults.
news.summary: Correction: Due to pagination errors, all attachments included in the release, in both English and Icelandic, have been replaced.
